    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl1", "grounding_span": "Bangladesh, ranked 82nd in the 2023 Oxford Insights AI Readiness Index", "location": "Abstract"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl2", "grounding_span": "It ranks 100th globally in the E-Government Development Index and 64th in broadband quality", "location": "sec-4.3"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl3", "grounding_span": "fewer than 10% had formal institutional guidance on GenAI as of 2023", "location": "sec-2.2"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl4", "grounding_span": "BUET, with the highest cumulative citation count (21,768), still averaged only 1,281 citations per faculty.", "location": "sec-5.2.1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl5", "grounding_span": "BRACU, by contrast, had 10,476 total citations with an average of 582 per faculty.", "location": "sec-5.2.1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl6", "grounding_span": "had only 3 female faculty out of 20, BRACU had 2 out of 18, BUET had 4 out of 17", "location": "sec-5.2.3"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl7", "grounding_span": "no formal national ethics framework for AI currently exists", "location": "sec-4.2"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl8", "grounding_span": "in force since August 1, 2024", "location": "sec-2.2"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl9", "grounding_span": "Bangladesh does not have a national algorithmic impact assessment protocol or AI sandbox testing environment", "location": "sec-4.2"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "bangladesh-s-ai-readiness-perspectives", "to_id": "cl10", "grounding_span": "Findings reveal outdated curricula, limited faculty upskilling, inadequate computing resources, entrenched gender disparities, and the near-total absence of AI ethics instruction.", "location": "Abstract"},
